rows.label: xs33590100_MSG0010
rows.name: Ah! Thank goodness[ST:wide ]— you're safe as well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33590100_MSG0020
rows.name: Um[ST:wide ]— I didn't know what to do[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33590100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I'm truly glad
I met you here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33590100_MSG0040
rows.name:
Ah[ST:wide ]— this is no time to be having
a conversation like this, is it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33590100_MSG0050
rows.name: Come, let's go. For the sake of our future[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33590100_MSG0060
rows.name: I'll do my absolute best as well![ST:wait ]
